## Comprehensive review follow-through

A wider sweep across the whole project: bug fixes in the PAM module
and polkit agent, distribution-pipeline corrections (aarch64 release,
broader compositor support), code-structure cleanups, and new
repo-level docs (CONTRIBUTING, CHANGELOG, CODEOWNERS).

No config-format changes; the `[audio]` section added in v0.5.1 is
unchanged. The `secondary` field default is now empty (it used to
name the buttons explicitly, which broke under `randomize_buttons`);
admins who customized it keep their value.

## What changed

### Bug fixes

- **`timeout = 0` (no auto-deny) no longer kills the dialog at 5 s.**
  The PAM-side `poll(2)` deadline now honours the "wait forever"
  config, mirroring the helper's own behaviour. With `timeout = 0`
  set in `/etc/security/sentinel.conf`, the dialog stays open until
  the user clicks a button.
- **Bypass-queue cross-action correlation closed.** When polkit
  cancels an in-flight authentication after the user has clicked
  Allow, the agent now drains the approval queue so the next
  authentication can't accidentally consume the canceled one's
  approval. (Practical exploit window was ≤1 s but the audit log
  was wrong even in the benign case.)
- **PAM `resolve_user` no longer misattributes polkit auths to root.**
  In the `polkit-agent-helper-1` path the parent is `systemd` (PID
  1, uid 0); the previous fallback collapsed to root. Now we prefer
  `pamh.get_user()` which has the actual requesting user.
- **`install.sh` / `uninstall.sh` agent kill is precise.** The old
  `pkill -f sentinel-polkit-agent` matched any process whose cmdline
  *mentioned* the name (e.g. `tail -f sentinel-polkit-agent.log`,
  `journalctl -t sentinel-polkit-agent`). Replaced with
  `pkill -fx <abs-path>` (exact-match against the full cmdline) — the
  agent's cmdline is exactly its install path, but a shell running
  `journalctl -t …` isn't, so collateral kills are eliminated. (Note:
  plain `-x` would have looked tempting but the kernel truncates
  `/proc/<pid>/comm` at 15 chars, so "sentinel-polkit-agent" — 21
  chars — never matched there.)
- **Cookie-prefix logging is multi-byte safe.** The agent's
  `cookie_prefix` previously sliced bytes; now it iterates `chars()`
  so a non-ASCII cookie can't panic on a UTF-8 boundary.
- **Wayland socket detection requires a real socket.** Lockfiles
  (`wayland-N.lock`) and stray regular files named `wayland-*` no
  longer fool `display::detect_for_user`.

### Distribution

- **aarch64 prebuilt deb/rpm/tarball.** The release pipeline now
  matrixes `aarch64-unknown-linux-gnu` on `ubuntu-24.04-arm`
  alongside x86_64. The PKGBUILD's existing `arch=('x86_64' 'aarch64')`
  claim is now backed by actual artefacts.
- **Niri / River / wlroots compositors get the autostart entry.**
  Removed the over-restrictive `OnlyShowIn` from
  `sentinel-polkit-agent.desktop`; the agent now autostarts on every
  compositor except the ones with a built-in polkit agent (GNOME,
  KDE, XFCE, LXDE, Cinnamon, MATE, LXQt, Pantheon, Budgie).
- **`X-systemd-skip=true`** added next to `X-GNOME-Autostart-enabled=false`
  for explicit forward-compat with future systemd-xdg-autostart
  generators.

### UX

- **Secondary line is now empty by default.** The previous "Click
  Allow… or Deny…" wording named the left button, which was at odds
  with the `randomize_buttons` design. Admins who want a hint line
  set `secondary = "..."` in `/etc/security/sentinel.conf` and the
  helper renders it verbatim.
- **Generic shield fallback icon (`system-lock-screen`)** on the
  dialog when the requesting binary's basename has no theme match.
  UAC-style anchor that this is a privilege prompt.
- **Details panel is consistent height** when expanded (no more
  "single field collapses to one line" visual bug).
- **`event=auth.headless reason=no-wayland`** audit line distinguishes
  "no display detected" from "config wants password" in
  `journalctl -t pam_sentinel`.

### Internals

- **Shared `audit::init_syslog`** in `sentinel-shared`; PAM module
  and agent stop duplicating the boilerplate. New `audit::audit_emit`
  fallback for hosts that already own the `log` global registration.
- **Shared `POLKIT_PAM_SERVICE` const** in `sentinel-shared`.
- **Structured `zbus::Error::MethodError` matching** for the
  registration-race retry; no more substring-grepping `Debug`
  output.
- **Renamed `RenderMode` enum** + `Args::effective_render_mode`
  method replaces the mutate-and-rebind dance in the helper main.
- **`every_bundle_has_matching_placeholders`** new test asserts
  `{$arg}` parity between en-US and every other locale's value of
  the same key — catches translator-introduced placeholder drift.
- **Dropped dead `POLKIT_AGENT_HELPER_CANDIDATES`** compile-time env
  in the agent's `build.rs` (was never read by any source file).

### CI / repo

- **`cargo deny check`** new CI job + `deny.toml` — license / source /
  banned-crate enforcement on every PR.
- **Package smoke job** runs `cargo deb --no-build` and
  `cargo generate-rpm` on PRs to catch packaging-metadata typos at
  PR time, not release time.
- **Pre-tag release-notes guard** in `release.yml` — refuses to start
  a release if `.github/release-notes/v$VERSION.md` is missing.
- **`CONTRIBUTING.md`, `CHANGELOG.md`, `CODEOWNERS`,
  `.github/FUNDING.yml`** added at repo root.
- **README badges** for CI / latest release / license / MSRV.

## Verify

```bash
pgrep -af sentinel-polkit-agent
pkexec true
journalctl -t sentinel-polkit-agent -t pam_sentinel \
    --output=cat --since "1 minute ago" \
    | grep "event=auth"
```

Niri / River users: the agent should now autostart on next session
start.

aarch64 users: prebuilt `.deb` and `.rpm` are now on the
[Releases](https://github.com/atayozcan/sentinel/releases) page.

## Wiki

Full installation, configuration, architecture, and troubleshooting
docs at <https://github.com/atayozcan/sentinel/wiki>.
